captures.notes: Canonical Codrops case-study link for attribution and technical framing; local evidence below is generated from scratch for learning review.
Local generated rebuild screenshot showing distorted wire grid, cursor influence ring, and face-like particle sculpture; not copied from the Phantom.land demo.
Local generated motion clip isolates ambient cursor offset, grid distortion, and particle sculpture wobble; not copied from the Phantom.land demo.
Standalone local HTML/SVG exercise reconstructing the primitive with generated grid lines, face particles, cursor field rings, and CSS-only orbit motion.
Manifest lists only generated local learning evidence plus source-link attribution boundaries.

summary: Interactive grid and particle-face case study rebuilt as a local wire-grid, particle, and UI-sculpture learning primitive with still, motion, code, and asset evidence.
title: Phantom.land Interactive Grid and 3D Face Particle System
why_relevant: Good reference for spatial technical surfaces, invisible-force interaction, ambient distortion, and clustered evidence sculpture.
